title: LuxeMid Modern Sectional Sofa
description: A spacious L-shaped sofa with plush cushions and a sleek low back, perfect for contemporary living rooms. Upholstered in soft, stain-resistant fabric, it offers both comfort and style for family gatherings.

title: Rustic Oak 5-Drawer Dresser
description: Handcrafted from solid oak, this five-drawer dresser brings a warm, rustic charm to any bedroom. Each drawer glides smoothly on brass runners, providing ample storage for clothing and linens.

title: SolarGlow LED Floor Lamp
description: This tall floor lamp features an adjustable arm and a dimmable LED bulb powered by an integrated solar panel. Ideal for eco-conscious homes, it provides bright, energy-efficient lighting without increasing electricity costs.

title: Serenity Plush Area Rug
description: A 9'x12' hand-tufted rug made from ultra-soft polyester fibers, offering a cozy foundation for any living space. The subtle geometric pattern adds a touch of elegance while feeling gentle underfoot.

attributes.care_instructions: Vacuum weekly; spot clean with mild detergent

title: Nordic Pine Wall-Mounted Shelf
description: A minimalist wall shelf crafted from sustainably sourced pine, perfect for displaying books, plants, or décor. Its floating design saves floor space while adding a clean, Nordic aesthetic.

title: CozyNest Memory Foam Mattress
description: A 12-inch memory foam mattress that conforms to your body for personalized support and pressure relief. The breathable cover helps regulate temperature for a cooler night's sleep.

title: Eclipse 42" Smart Ceiling Fan
description: A sleek ceiling fan with integrated smart controls, allowing you to adjust speed, direction, and lighting via a mobile app. Whisper-quiet blades and an energy-efficient motor keep rooms comfortable year-round.

title: Harbor Bay Ceramic Vase Set
description: A set of three hand-painted ceramic vases in varying heights, ideal for fresh flowers or decorative branches. The coastal-inspired glaze adds a pop of color to any tabletop.

attributes.dimensions: 12 x 6 in, 18 x 8 in, 24 x 10 in

title: EcoBamboo Kitchen Towels (6-pack)
description: Ultra-absorbent towels made from 100% organic bamboo fibers, offering a soft feel and natural antibacterial properties. Perfect for drying dishes, hands, or countertops.

attributes.care_instructions: Machine wash cold, tumble dry low

title: ZenStone Natural Stone Shower Curtain
description: A 72" x 72" shower curtain crafted from lightweight, non-porous natural stone composite that resists mold and mildew. Its neutral stone texture complements modern bathroom designs.

title: VelvetTouch Throw Blanket
description: A luxurious 50" x 60" throw made from a blend of 80% cotton and 20% polyester velvet, providing warmth and a plush texture. Ideal for draping over sofas or adding a layer of comfort to beds.

attributes.care_instructions: Machine wash gentle, tumble dry low

title: Alpine Lodge Rustic Bookshelf
description: A sturdy 5-shelf bookcase constructed from reclaimed pine, featuring a distressed finish that adds character to any study or living area. Its open design accommodates books, décor, and storage bins.

title: LumenGlow Dimmable Table Lamp
description: A compact table lamp with a brushed brass base and a linen shade, offering adjustable brightness via a touch-sensitive dimmer. Perfect for bedside reading or creating ambient lighting.

title: PureAir HEPA Air Purifier
description: A compact air purifier equipped with a true HEPA filter that captures 99.97% of particles as small as 0.3 microns, improving indoor air quality for allergy sufferers. Includes a quiet fan and night mode.

title: Bamboo Bliss Eco-Friendly Cutting Board Set
description: Three cutting boards (small, medium, large) made from sustainably harvested bamboo, featuring juice grooves and non-slip edges for safe food prep. Naturally antimicrobial and easy to clean.

attributes.dimensions: 12 x 8 in, 16 x 12 in, 20 x 14 in

title: SleekLine Glass Coffee Table
description: A minimalist coffee table with a tempered glass top and a chrome-finished steel frame, offering a sleek look that complements any modern living area. The lower shelf provides extra storage for magazines.

title: Coastal Breeze Woven Wall Mirror
description: A 36" round wall mirror framed with hand-woven jute, adding texture and a breezy coastal vibe to entryways or bathrooms. The lightweight design makes hanging easy.

title: Harmony Adjustable Bed Frame
description: An upholstered platform bed with built-in adjustable head and foot sections, controlled via a wireless remote. Features a sturdy steel frame and a plush, quilted headboard for added comfort.
